description: Unpack a .pptx (a ZIP archive) into a pretty-printed XML directory for editing: extracts all parts, pretty-prints every .xml/.rels, and escapes smart quotes so the tree is hand-editable. (Run merging / redline simplification applies to DOCX only.)
rules: requires defusedxml (vendored core imports defusedxml.minidom for pretty-printing); degrades gracefully when absent
the unpacked tree is written to a 'unpacked' subdir under record_store; a one-line summary is captured to unpack.log
non-destructive to the source — PPTX_FILE is only read
usage: Set PPTX_FILE (path to a .pptx). Output: unpacked/ (editable XML tree) plus unpack.log. Edit the tree, then use the pack perk to rebuild.
limitation: Accepts .docx/.pptx/.xlsx; this perk is scoped to .pptx. The merge-runs / simplify-redlines passes are DOCX-only no-ops here.
